description: An automated alert indicates that the SSL certificate for the main application domain will expire in 14 days.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent takes ownership of the task.

nodes.task_description: Generate a new Certificate Signing Request (CSR) and purchase a new SSL certificate from a Certificate Authority.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully obtains a new certificate.

nodes.task_description: Install the new certificate on the load balancers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully deploys the new certificate without causing downtime.
